mapper.insert:
insert into tc_sample_test_tb(id,experiment_code,region_num, seed_num,project_code,vector_task_code, species_code,target_character,generation_code, tc_gene,sample_code,sample_time, sample_apply_num,task_num,test_identify_primer, test_method,test_edit_type,test_org_result, test_no_trans_identity_primer,test_is_gene_modify_positive,test_if_fixed_point, test_if_copy_insert,test_fixed_point_type,test_donor_residue_info, test_insertion_site,test_elisa_result,test_qbzr_seq, test_edit_residue_info,test_time,test_user_id, test_user_name,identify_primer,check_result, apply_type) values
(#{item.id,jdbcType=NUMERIC},#{item.experimentCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},#{item.regionNum,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.seedNum,jdbcType=VARCHAR},#{item.projectCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},#{item.vectorTaskCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.speciesCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},#{item.targetCharacter,jdbcType=VARCHAR},#{item.generationCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.tcGene,jdbcType=VARCHAR},#{item.sampleCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},#{item.sampleTime,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.sampleApplyNum,jdbcType=VARCHAR},#{item.taskNum,jdbcType=VARCHAR},#{item.testIdentifyPrimer,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.testMethod,jdbcType=VARCHAR},#{item.testEditType,jdbcType=VARCHAR},#{item.testOrgResult,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.testNoTransIdentityPrimer,jdbcType=VARCHAR},#{item.testIsGeneModifyPositive,jdbcType=VARCHAR},#{item.testIfFixedPoint,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.testIfCopyInsert,jdbcType=VARCHAR},#{item.testFixedPointType,jdbcType=VARCHAR},#{item.testDonorResidueInfo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.testInsertionSite,jdbcType=VARCHAR},#{item.testElisaResult,jdbcType=VARCHAR},#{item.testQbzrSeq,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.testEditResidueInfo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},#{item.testTime,jdbcType=VARCHAR},#{item.testUserId,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{item.testUserName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},#{item.identifyPrimer,jdbcType=VARCHAR},#{item.checkResult,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.applyType,jdbcType=VARCHAR})
